name: Will schema markup alone get my business into Google Assistant answers?
description: No. Schema helps Google understand your page, but it works best with clear content, local signals, and solid site performance.

mainEntity.name: Will schema markup alone get my business into Google Assistant answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Schema helps Google understand what your page is about, but it is not a guarantee that Assistant will use your content. The best results usually come from combining schema with strong page copy, local signals, and good technical performance.
acceptedAnswer.description: No. Schema helps Google understand your page, but it works best with clear content, local signals, and solid site performance.
